title: Ireland warned over ‘life‑or‑death’ inequities in cancer trial access [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Only 1.1 per cent of the 5,300 cancer trials opened across the EU in the first nine months of 2025 were located in Ireland
summary_public: Only 1.1 per cent of the 5,300 cancer trials opened across the EU in the first nine months of 2025 were located in Ireland
